metadata.description: Nemonemo — marketplace personal de plugins de Claude Code. Plugins propios + curaduría de terceros como referencia.

plugins.name: nemo-siamese
plugins.description: SessionStart greeting: prints an ASCII Siamese cat and a random cat fact at the beginning of every Claude Code session.

plugins.name: nemo-caveman
plugins.description: Slash command /caveman: activa modo de respuestas ultra-compactas estilo caveman (drop fluff, keep technical substance).

plugins.name: nemo-habla
plugins.description: Estilo de comunicación. Hook UserPromptSubmit que fuerza respuestas siempre en español (es-ES), incluso bajo caveman; y slash command /llados-mode que hace que Claude hable como Amadeo Lladós.

plugins.name: forge-security
plugins.description: Security reminder hook: warns about insecure patterns (XSS, eval, pickle, etc.) when editing files.

plugins.name: forge-deepthink
plugins.description: Structured deep-thinking protocol invoked via /deepthink — pre-filled 7-slot interview, audit-ready response.

plugins.name: forge-deep-review
plugins.description: Specialized review: 5 deep-review agents + automated PR review with inline GitHub comments.

plugins.name: forge-keeper
plugins.description: Context maintenance: /sync (analyze diff and propose CLAUDE.md updates), /status, /recall, /update-check (check upstream updates for vendored plugins), /handoff, /segment-doc, /heal-plugin-cache.

plugins.name: forge-proactive-qa
plugins.description: Autonomous QA agent: explores web apps with Playwright to find bugs, auto-fixes them with validation and retry. Three modes: explore (browse and log), autofix (fix with retry), cycle (alternate for /loop).
